form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[合同编号] contractName[合同名称] orgId[业务组织] customerId[客户] signedBy[签约人] businessDate[签约日期] validFrom[生效日] validTo[失效日] =========>amount[金额信息]====== currencyId[币种] exchangeRate[汇率] totalAmount[合计金额(不含税)] totalTaxAmount[合计税额] totalAmountWithTax[合计金额(含税)] =========>status[状态信息]====== docStatus[单据状态] approveStatus[审核状态] =========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] approvedBy[审核人] approvedAt[审核时间] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

=========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[合同编号] contractName[合同名称] orgId[业务组织] customerId[客户] signedBy[签约人] businessDate[签约日期] validFrom[生效日] validTo[失效日] =========>amount[金额信息]====== currencyId[币种] exchangeRate[汇率] totalAmount[合计金额(不含税)] totalTaxAmount[合计税额] totalAmountWithTax[合计金额(含税)] =========>status[状态信息]====== docStatus[单据状态] approveStatus[审核状态] remark[备注](2)

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: code[合同编号] customerId[客户] docStatus[单据状态] approveStatus[审核状态] businessDate[签约日期]
